scripts.electron-dev-win: set NODE_ENV=development && npm run bundle-python-win && concurrently "npm start" "uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && node node_modules\electron\cli.js ."
scripts.electron-dev-mac: export NODE_ENV=development && npm run bundle-python-mac && concurrently "npm start" "uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npx electron ."
scripts.dist:mac-x64: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh x64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && npx dotenv -e .env.development -- electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.dist:mac-dmg-x64: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh x64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && npx dotenv -e .env.development -- electron-builder --mac dmg --x64
scripts.dist:mac-pkg-x64: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh x64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && npx dotenv -e .env.development -- electron-builder --mac pkg --x64
scripts.dist:mac-arm64: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh arm64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && npx dotenv -e .env.development -- electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:mac-dmg-arm64: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh arm64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && npx dotenv -e .env.development -- electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.dist:mac-pkg-arm64: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh arm64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && npx dotenv -e .env.development -- electron-builder --mac pkg --arm64
scripts.dist:mac-dmg-arm64-dev: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh arm64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false CSC_SKIP_NOTARIZATION=true electron-builder -c.mac.identity=null --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.dist:mac-pkg-arm64-dev: npm run build && ./build-python-bundle-mac.sh arm64 && npm run copy-build-files-mac && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false CSC_SKIP_NOTARIZATION=true npx dotenv electron-builder --mac pkg --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File build-python-bundle-win.ps1 -Architecture x64 && npm run copy-build-files-win && electron-builder --win
scripts.copy-build-files-mac: cp electron.js build/ && cp preload.js build/ && cp public/vosk-audio-processor.js build/ && cp -r Certification build/ && cp -r pkg-scripts build/
scripts.copy-build-files-win: copy electron.js build\ && copy preload.js build\ && copy public\vosk-audio-processor.js build\ && xcopy /E /I /Y Certification build\Certification
scripts.electron: npm run build && set NODE_ENV=production && node node_modules\electron\cli.js .
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && npm run copy-build-files-mac && electron-builder
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run copy-build-files-mac && electron-builder --linux
